cms.task_text: Seřaďte: pro každý roh [hlp]nejdřív skočte (jumpTo), pak tečka (dot)[/hlp].
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_dot" x="200" y="26"></block><block type="turtle_jump_to" x="22" y="26"><value name="X"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">50</field></shadow></value><value name="Y"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">50</field></shadow></value></block><block type="turtle_jump_to" x="22" y="140"><value name="X"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">270</field></shadow></value><value name="Y"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">50</field></shadow></value></block><block type="turtle_dot" x="200" y="140"></block></xml>
